splits.title: Lesson I - Theology and Testimony: The Dispensation of the Meridian of Time Part I. The Forerunner
splits.start_boundary: GUIDE LESSONS FOR MAY LESSON I Theology and Testimony.
splits.end_boundary: Was John blessed by his father and if so, when?

splits.title: Lesson II - Work and Business: Teachers' Topic - The Mother
splits.start_boundary: Work and Business TEACHERS' TOPIC (Second Week in May)
splits.end_boundary: attend church duties and live the laws of the gospel.

splits.title: Lesson III - Literature: Joaquin Miller
splits.start_boundary: LESSON III Literature (Third Week in May) JOAQUIN MILLER
splits.end_boundary: It can not fail to be a very useful book.

splits.title: Lesson IV - Social Service: Physical Problems of Childhood
splits.start_boundary: LESSON IV Social Service (Fourth Week in May) PHYSICAL

files.notes: This file contains four distinct lesson sections for May, each covering a different week and subject area: Theology/Testimony, Work/Business, Literature, and Social Service. Each lesson has clear boundaries with lesson numbers and subject headings.
